Notes.Text:
This update for expat fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2025-59375: memory amplification vulnerability allows attackers to trigger excessive dynamic memory allocations
  by submitting crafted XML input (bsc#1249584).

Vulnerabilities.Description: libexpat in Expat before 2.7.2 allows attackers to trigger large dynamic memory allocations via a small document that is submitted for parsing.
